title: Test Drive
description: Book a private, no-pressure test drive at our Ibeju-Lekki showroom or a location of your choice.

title: Premium Warranty
description: Every vehicle comes backed by manufacturer-grade warranty coverage administered by Carrio Motors.

title: Certified Vehicles
description: Every unit undergoes a rigorous multi-point certification process before it reaches our showroom floor.

title: Vehicle Inspection
description: Independent pre-purchase inspection reports available on request for full transparency.

title: Roadside Assistance
description: 24/7 roadside support for Carrio clients, anywhere within Lagos and surrounding states.

title: Maintenance
description: Scheduled maintenance plans performed by manufacturer-trained technicians using genuine parts.

title: Insurance
description: Bundled comprehensive insurance packages tailored to your vehicle and usage profile.

title: Financing
description: Flexible finance plans with same-week approval for qualifying buyers.

title: Customer Support
description: A dedicated relationship manager guides you from enquiry through delivery and beyond.

title: Genuine Parts
description: Direct access to genuine OEM parts for every brand we carry.
